description_long: This object is a compact, handheld electronic device with a rectangular body and a slightly tapered front face. The front features a small display screen above a grid of physical buttons, likely for inputting numbers and commands, and two additional arrow-shaped buttons below. The top of the device has a short, cylindrical antenna and two round knobs, suggesting it is a communication device such as a walkie-talkie or two-way radio. The sides and back are textured for grip and are solid black, while the front is primarily red with gray and black accents. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear functional elements for user interaction and portability.
description: A compact, red and black handheld electronic device with a display, keypad, antenna, and control knobs, resembling a walkie-talkie.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display, keypad, arrow buttons, and the top-mounted antenna and knobs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the textured black grip and the protruding antenna at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back with the antenna and knobs visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the textured grip and antenna profile.
